Sanskrit morphology — a graded curriculum

7134 attested paradigms over 741775 corpus-attested inflected-form occurrences, ordered by declension/conjugation class then by lemma frequency. Only forms the corpus actually attests are drilled -- see the drills for practice, and the field's RQ1 for why.

4862 paradigms → 50% · 6351 paradigms → 80% · 6708 paradigms → 90%
